title: santia maritima
intro: Santia maritima, also known as sea lavender or rosemary, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant is rich in essential oils, including camphor and borneol, which possess medicinal properties that can help to calm the digestive system and relieve anxiety. The health benefits of santia maritima include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Santia maritima can be consumed as a herbal tea, added to salves or ointments for topical application, or used as an essential oil in aromatherapy.
